allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''human'': for block in obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\): if isinstance\(block, dict\) and ''webauthn'' in str\(block.get\(''text'', ''''\)\).lower\(\): print\(block.get\(''text'', ''''\)[:3000]\) print\(''---END---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''human'': msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) content = msg.get\(''content'', []\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: text = '''' if isinstance\(block, dict\): text = block.get\(''text'', ''''\) elif isinstance\(block, str\): text = block if ''webauthn'' in text.lower\(\) or ''물리키'' in text: print\(text[:5000]\) print\(''=== END BLOCK ===''\) except Exception as e: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''human'': msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) content = msg.get\(''content'', []\) full_text = json.dumps\(content, ensure_ascii=False\) if ''register'' in full_text.lower\(\) and ''start'' in full_text.lower\(\) and ''auth'' in full_text.lower\(\): # Found the message with API spec if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': t = block.get\(''text'', ''''\) if len\(t\) > 100: print\(t[:5000]\) print\(''=== END ===''\) except Exception as e: pass ")
